channel.title: ToolForge — AI Tool Reviews & Comparisons
channel.description: Hand-tested, honest reviews of the best AI tools in 2026. Updated weekly.

item.title: 9 Best AI Tools for E-commerce in 2026 (Boost Sales 40%+)
item.description: 9 AI tools for e-commerce in 2026. From product descriptions to ad creative to customer service. The tools that actually increase revenue.

item.title: AI Tools vs Human Work in 2026: What to Automate, What to Keep
item.description: AI tools vs human work in 2026. What to automate, what to keep, what to be careful about. The honest strategy guide.

item.title: The 8 Best AI Tools for Freelancers in 2026 (Save 10+ Hours/Week)
item.description: Stop wasting time on admin. The exact AI stack freelancers use to ship more work and earn more per hour. Tested, ranked, with real pricing.

item.title: The 10 Best AI Tools for Small Business Owners in 2026 (Save 20+ Hours/Week)
item.description: 10 AI tools that small business owners actually use to save 20+ hours/week. Real ROI, real pricing, no fluff. The 2026 stack for businesses under 50 people.

item.title: The 7 Best AI Tools for Developers in 2026
item.description: The AI coding tools senior engineers actually use. We tested Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, and more. Real benchmarks, real opinions.

item.title: The 7 Best AI Tools for Accountants in 2026 (Save 15+ Hours/Week)
item.description: Bookkeeping, tax research, audit prep, and client reports. The exact AI stack CPAs and bookkeepers are using in 2026 to bill more, work less, and avoid burnout.

item.title: 10 Best AI Tools for Social Media Managers in 2026 (Save 15+ Hours/Week)
item.description: The AI stack social media managers use to plan, write, design, and schedule a month of content in a single afternoon. Real tools, real pricing.

item.title: The 9 Best AI Tools for YouTube Creators in 2026
item.description: From scripting to thumbnails to editing — the AI stack top YouTubers use to ship videos 5x faster. Real tools, real prices, ranked.

item.title: 10 Best AI Tools for Photographers in 2026 (Edit, Organize, Deliver)
item.description: 10 AI tools for photographers in 2026. Editing, culling, organization, delivery, client galleries. The honest list from working pros.

item.title: The 10 Best AI Tools for Startups in 2026 (Under $200/mo Total)
item.description: The full AI stack early-stage startups use to look like a 20-person team. All under $200/month. Real pricing, no enterprise fluff.

item.title: 12 Best AI Tools That Are Actually Free (or Under $10/mo) in 2026
item.description: 12 AI tools that are actually free or under $10/mo in 2026. Tested for quality, ranked by value. The honest list for budget-conscious creators.

item.title: 10 Best AI Tools for Teachers and Educators in 2026 (Save 10+ Hours/Week)
item.description: 10 AI tools for teachers in 2026. From lesson planning to grading to parent emails. The honest list for K-12 and college educators.

item.title: How to Build a Full AI Stack for Under $50/Month (2026 Guide)
item.description: The complete AI productivity stack for $50/month or less. Real tool picks, free-tier combos, and a calculator for your use case. Tested by 50+ small teams.

item.title: 8 AI Tools That Pay for Themselves in Week 1 (2026 Review)
item.description: 8 AI tools that pay for themselves in week 1 of 2026. Real ROI math, real user testimonials, real pricing. The honest list for budget-conscious buyers.

item.title: 10 Best AI Tools for Students in 2026 (Study Smarter, Not Harder)
item.description: 10 AI tools that students actually use in 2026. Free and paid options for writing, math, studying, research. The honest list for high school and college.

item.title: 10 Best AI Tools for Content Writers in 2026 (Write 3x Faster)
item.description: 10 AI tools that content writers use in 2026. Research, drafting, SEO, editing, publishing. The honest list from working writers.

item.title: The 6 Best AI Tools for Developers in 2026 | ToolForge
item.description: The AI stack that will 5x your coding productivity this year.

item.title: The 8 Best AI Tools for Doctors & Clinicians in 2026 (Save 10+ Hours/Week)
item.description: The exact AI stack doctors and clinicians use to slash charting, write patient letters, and stay current with medical research. HIPAA-safe picks, real pricing.

item.title: The 9 Best AI Tools for Lawyers in 2026 (Save 15+ Hours/Week)
item.description: The exact AI stack modern lawyers use to draft contracts, review discovery, and bill more hours. Tested, ranked, with real pricing and ABA compliance notes.

item.title: 10 Best AI Tools for Marketing Teams in 2026 (Reduce Costs 60%)
item.description: 10 AI tools for marketing teams in 2026. Content, SEO, ads, email, analytics. The honest list from VP Marketing at high-growth companies.
